description_long: This is a two-story real estate agency building with a rectangular footprint and a gabled roof. The upper story is painted white and features green window shutters, while the lower story is a muted orange or brick color with a stone foundation. The front entrance is covered by a small portico supported by two columns, and there is a prominent brick chimney on one side of the building. Multiple large windows are present on both floors, some with decorative shutters, and a section of the facade appears to have a stone or brick accent. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century American suburban architecture, with a practical and welcoming appearance suitable for a neighborhood real estate office.
description: A two-story real estate agency with a gabled roof, green shutters, and a brick chimney, featuring a welcoming portico entrance and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a portico, two columns, large windows with green shutters, and a stone accent on the lower right.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the tall brick chimney, with green-shuttered windows on both floors and the roof's gable end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain facade with multiple windows and green shutters, and no visible entrance or chimney.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with green-shuttered windows and the gable end of the roof, lacking the chimney seen on the other side.
